extortion.description: International Standard Valve, Inc. specializes in providing a range of ball valves, gate, globe, and check valves tailored for theoil and gas, oil refining, natural gas, power generation, chemical, petrochemical, pulp and paper, and mining industries.We will upload corporate data soon. Employee information (name, DOB and other information), detailed financials, customer information, contracts and agreements, projects, specifications and so on.
